name: Hardcore Survivor
overview: Welcome to the Hardcore Series a self-imposed set of rules to increase the difficulty of Dead by Daylight and give more of a horror aspect to the game where every game needs to be played perfectly in order to progress. The objective of this season is to climb from Rank 20 to Rank 1 as Survivor!

trailers.title: The DBD Nuzlocke Challenge  – Hardcore Survivor S3:E1 | Dead by Daylight
I Challenged Otzdarva, Ayrun & JRM – Hardcore Survivor S2:E1
